name: promptcontract
description: Local-first prompt contract lint and validation CLI.

scripts.smoke: node dist/cli.js check fixtures/pass/*.md && node dist/cli.js check fixtures/fail/*.md --report json --output tmp/fail-report.json; test $? -eq 1
scripts.package:smoke: npm run build && npm run bin:smoke && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke
scripts.bin:smoke: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p=require('./package.json'); const bins=typeof p.bin==='string'?{[p.name]:p.bin}:p.bin||{}; for (const [name,target] of Object.entries(bins)) { if (!fs.existsSync(target)) { console.error(name + ' bin target missing: ' + target); process.exit(1); } }"

author: Roger Chappel
